categoryDescription.developer: Generators, converters, and everyday dev utilities.
categoryDescription.pdf: Merge, split, and edit PDF documents.
categoryDescription.security: QR codes, OTP, and certificate tools.

base64.title: Base64 Encode / Decode
base64.description: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to text.

url.title: URL Encode / Decode
url.description: Percent-encode text for URLs or decode it back.

html.title: HTML Encode / Decode
html.description: Escape text into HTML entities or decode entities back to text.

jwt.title: JWT Decoder
jwt.description: Decode a JSON Web Token's header and payload. Does not verify the signature.
jwt.noVerify: The signature is not verified — this tool only decodes the token.
jwt.invalid: Input is not a valid JWT.

json.title: JSON Formatter
json.description: Beautify or minify JSON, with validation.

json-yaml.title: JSON ↔ YAML
json-yaml.description: Convert between JSON and YAML in either direction.

markdown.title: Markdown Preview
markdown.description: Write Markdown and see it rendered live (sanitized).

diff.title: Diff Viewer
diff.description: Compare two texts line by line.
diff.empty: Enter text in both panes to see the differences.

lorem.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
lorem.description: Generate placeholder paragraphs, sentences, or words.

uuid.title: UUID Generator
uuid.description: Generate RFC-4122 UUIDs (v1, v4, v6, v7, or nil).

password.title: Password Generator
password.description: Generate strong random passwords in your browser.
password.noSet: Select at least one character set.

hash.title: Hash Generator
hash.description: Compute MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 digests.
hash.inputPlaceholder: Type or paste text to hash…

hmac.title: HMAC Generator
hmac.description: Compute a keyed hash (HMAC) of a message.

timestamp.title: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates.
timestamp.inputPlaceholder: Unix timestamp or a date string…
timestamp.invalid: Could not parse that as a timestamp or date.

cron.title: Cron Parser
cron.description: Explain a cron expression and preview its next runs.

regex.title: Regex Tester
regex.description: Test a regular expression against sample text.

sql.title: SQL Formatter
sql.description: Format and beautify SQL for many dialects.

color.title: Color Converter
color.description: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL.
